title: Software Update - DFU - Putting app in background during update
scenario: Verify successful Device Firmware Update (DFU) when app is backgrounded during the update and returns to foreground
steps: Start a Device Firmware Update (DFU) from the app.
While the DFU is in progress, put the app into the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
Wait for a reasonable period to allow the DFU to continue in the background.
Return to the app (bring it back to the foreground).
Observe the DFU status and wait for the update to complete.
expected: The DFU continues successfully while the app is in the background, and the update completes properly when returning to the app.
